name: Gangster Disciples (Detroit)
description: The Gangster Disciples are a highly organized African-American street and prison gang founded in Chicago in 1966 by Larry Hoover, active in more than 35 states including Michigan. The Detroit chapter operates as part of the national Gangster Disciples structure, which has an estimated 30,000-40,000 members nationwide. The organization uses the "Growth and Development" motto and a six-pointed star as its symbol. Members in Detroit are involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and territorial control across multiple neighborhoods.

sources.title: Gangster Disciples: A Gang Profile — DOJ
